entities.name: TROPICAL LEGUMES PROJECTS
entities.description: A 12-year initiative aimed at empowering communities through the introduction of legume technologies

entities.name: LEGUME TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Recently developed agricultural technologies and newly released varieties of legume crops

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop whose newly released varieties were promoted by the TL projects

entities.name: COMMON BEAN
entities.description: A legume crop whose newly released varieties were promoted by the TL projects

entities.name: COWPEA
entities.description: A legume crop whose newly released varieties were promoted by the TL projects

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop whose newly released varieties were promoted by the TL projects

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency of crop production per unit area, which was increased through the project

entities.name: PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total volume of crop yield, which was increased through the project

entities.name: RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capacity of the agricultural system to recover from or withstand adverse conditions

entities.name: ADVERSE WEATHER CONDITIONS
entities.description: Unfavorable environmental weather patterns that impact crop growth and stability

entities.name: FAMILY WELFARE
entities.description: The overall socio-economic well-being of families in the project areas

entities.name: LIVELIHOOD ASSETS
entities.description: Resources such as land, housing, and market connections that support family welfare

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food
